basic_details.short_information: The latest Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Group-C Posts! Published on 20 May 2026 at the official KEA website, this new recruitment drive offers 6 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18–45 years age group and possessing a 12th-pass or Degree qualification can apply online from 20 May 2026 to 03 June 2026. Find all details about the KEA Group-C Posts vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 750/- (Rs. 500 Application Fee + Rs. 250 Processing Fee)
application_fee.sc_fee: Rs. 500/- (Rs. 250 Application Fee + Rs. 250 Processing Fee)

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years. Max: 40 (General), 43 (2A, 2B, 3A, 3B), 45 (SC, ST, Cat-1) years.
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years for General Merit candidates. Maximum Age: 43 years for Category 2A, 2B, 3A, 3B candidates. Maximum Age: 45 years for SC, ST, Category-1 candidates. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for Ex-Servicemen, NCC Cadets, Rural Development Scheme Personnel, Persons with Disabilities, and Widows.

qualification.details: First Division Assistant: Degree from a University established by law in India. Equivalency of degree as per Govt. Circular No. CiAsuI 81 Sevane 2017, dated 27.02.2018. Second Division Assistant: PUC or equivalent qualification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 44425-83700 (First Division Assistant), Rs. 34100-67700 (Second Division Assistant)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KEA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KEA to complete the application.
